am.gui package¶

Submodules¶

am.gui.aml_wrapper module¶

Wrapper for running AML with GUI

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.aml_wrapper.AMWrapper¶

Bases: object

Wrapper for Analogical Modelling with GUI.

adjust_data_to_class_idx() → DataFrame¶

Permute lexicon such that class column comes last.

cancel() → None¶

Stop AML

run() → None¶

Run AML

run_in_thread() → str¶

Run AML in separate thread

validate() → str¶

Check that all required parameters are valid.

Returns:

string containing all problem descriptions (or empty string)

validate_max_threshold(*_args) → None¶

Make sure that threshold non-negative float.

validate_threshold(*_args) → None¶

Make sure that threshold non-negative float.

am.gui.gui_utils module¶

Utility classes for AML GUI

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.CheckboxFrames(parent, wrapper)¶

Bases: object

Frames for additional options.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.ClsFrame(parent: Frame, wrapper)¶

Bases: VisOnCommandFrame

Frame for class column selection.

fill(vals: list)¶

Refill combobox with values and set current to last one.

Parameters:

vals – list of values

get(idx: int | None = None)¶

Get index of selected element or element with given index.

Parameters:

idx – index of element to retrieve

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.CountFrame(parent, wrapper)¶

Bases: object

Frame to determine count strategy.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.IgnoreFrame(parent: Frame)¶

Bases: VisOnCommandFrame

Frame for selecting ignored columns

clear() → None¶

Remove all items from listbox.

fill(items: Iterable) → None¶

Fill listbox with items.

Parameters:

items – items to insert

list_selected() → list¶

List selected items of listbox.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.MainConfigFrame(app, parent, wrapper)¶

Bases: object

Frame for main config, including lexicon, test set, column specifications and output.

clear_test()¶

Clear testset and update widgets accordingly.

static get_file(button: Button)¶

Let user select a file.

Parameters:

button – button to be updated accordingly

get_lexicon()¶

Get lexicon file and populate widgets accordingly.

get_testset()¶

Get testset and update widgets accordingly.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.OutFrame(parent: Frame, wrapper)¶

Bases: object

Helper for specifying output path

get_out_dir()¶

Let user select directory.

update_label_text(_arg=None)¶

Update text of label according to specified directory and name.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.OutputSelection(parent: Frame)¶

Bases: object

Wrapper for selecting which files to display.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.StartFrame(app, parent, wrapper)¶

Bases: object

Frame for starting/stopping algorithm.

check_completion()¶

Check whether wrapped progress complete.

disable_all_but_cancel(frame) → None¶

Disable all but the cancel/start buttons.

Parameters:

frame – frame in which to disable widgets

enable_all(frame)¶

Re-enable all buttons.

Parameters:

frame – frame in which to enable widgets

on_end()¶

Reset everything to pre-run state.

run()¶

Start and monitor algorithm; disable buttons.

stop(reason: str | None = None) → None¶

Stop process.

Display reason in messagebox, if any.

Parameters:

reason – reason for stopping

update_probressbar()¶

Update progressbar.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.ThresholdFrame(parent: Frame, wrapper, upper=False)¶

Bases: VisOnCommandFrame

Frame for setting weight threshold.

static validate_numeric(val) → bool¶

Validate threshold as numeric, non-negative value.

Parameters:

val – threshold value to validate

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.ToolTip(widget, text)¶

Bases: ToolTip

Helper class to get same configurations for all tooltips.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.VisOnCommandFrame(parent: Frame, config: dict)¶

Bases: object

Helper for visualizing/hiding specific frames.

invis() → None¶

Hide frame.

vis() → None¶

Visualize frame.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.gui_utils.WeightsFrame(parent: Frame, wrapper)¶

Bases: VisOnCommandFrame

Frame for configuring weights.

fill(vals: list) → None¶

Fill Combobox with new values.

Parameters:

vals – values

val_and_vis(_arg=None)¶

Validate weights column and visualize threshold selection.

am.gui.vis module¶

Utils for visualizing AML output using tkinter and pandastable

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.vis.CSVSavingTable(parent=None, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Table

saveAs(filename=None)¶

Save dataframe to file.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.vis.MatrixVisualization(root, matrix, save=None)¶

Bases: object

Visualize confusion matrix in tkinter.

class analogical_modeling.am.gui.vis.TableVisualization(root, df)¶

Bases: object

Visualize tables in tkinter.
